reasoning: Fraud alert indicates customer has 14 refunds in 55 days with identical false claims (previously 'item not received' despite confirmed delivery). Current claim 'This isn't what I ordered' aligns with pattern of fraudulent behavior. Total refunded $1851.56 with 88% refund rate exceeds acceptable thresholds. SLA requires immediate escalation to Loss Prevention per system warning.
